hero.description: Hi, I’m Kirill — a Senior Frontend Engineer based in Moscow, crafting high-load web & mobile apps with React, Next.js, WebGL and Web3.

projects.title: Strata Markets — Web3 / DeFi Platform
projects.desc: A full-fledged Web3 platform for crypto assets and DeFi: crypto-wallet integration, smart-contract interactions, token swaps and real-time trading analytics with light/dark theming.

projects.title: Strata Markets — Animated Landing
projects.desc: High-load marketing landing built with scroll-driven animations, Lottie and complex parallax effects, plus a Hashnode-powered blog (GraphQL).

projects.title: KupitKartinu — Art Marketplace
projects.desc: Next.js marketplace for buying and selling art with auctions, a headless WordPress CMS and an SEO-optimized, high-performance catalog.

projects.title: Enterprise Access Control (Sberbank ecosystem)
projects.desc: Internal CRM for privileged access management: session recording Video/Terminal Player, WebSockets, WEB-RDP/SSH in the browser and a flexible Keycloak/Casbin role model.

projects.title: tutu.ru — Interactive WebGL Game
projects.desc: Interactive marketing game built with PixiJS (WebGL) and integrated into the mobile app via WebView, with high-performance rendering tuned for mobile devices.

projects.title: PharmAssistant — E-learning Platform
projects.desc: E-learning platform for pharmacy professionals with interactive training modules and multi-step onboarding, receipt scanning and voice assistant

projects.title: Matchflow Analytics — B2B Dashboard
projects.desc: Analytical dashboard and B2B service for pharma manufacturers and pharmacy chains, with real-time data updates over WebSockets/SSE; product orders and much more

projects.title: Dophaminka — Mobile App
projects.desc: React Native app with a receipt-scanning feature and real-time reward mechanics, shipped to the App Store and Google Play. Yandex maps integration; On-Device functions

projects.title: thecrypto — B2B Sales CRM
projects.desc: Internal CRM with Google Sheets and AI integration, animated landing pages and Google OAuth2 authentication on a modular, scalable architecture.

items.title: Senior Frontend Engineer · Sreda Capital (BI.ZONE)
items.review: At Sreda Capital (BI.ZONE) I lead frontend on high-load products across enterprise security, Web3/DeFi and e-commerce — building scalable architectures and interactive WebGL experiences.
responsibilities: Developing scalable frontend architectures for high-load SPAs, Web3, and real-time systems
Developing interactive WebGL solutions, complex animations, and graphics (Three.js / PIXI.js)
Building UI layers: design systems, reusable components, and accessibility (a11y)
Leading frontend development on projects, mentoring developers, and conducting code reviews

items.title: Frontend Engineer (React / React Native) · PharmHUB
items.review: At PharmHUB I built and modernized web & mobile products for the pharmacy industry, shipping React Native apps to the App Store and Google Play.
responsibilities: Developing web applications with React / Next.js and mobile applications with React Native
Participating in UX research, interface design, and gathering client requirements
Optimizing performance and refactoring existing codebases
Publishing and maintaining applications in the App Store and Google Play

items.title: Web Developer · thecrypto
items.review: At thecrypto I delivered a modular frontend for a B2B sales CRM with Google Sheets and AI integration, plus polished, smoothly animated landing pages.
responsibilities: Developing a modular CRM system for B2B sales with AI and Google Sheets integrations
Creating responsive landing pages with smooth animations and 3D graphics (GSAP / Three.js)
Integrating third-party APIs (Google OAuth2, data synchronization)
Conducting code reviews and implementing clean code standards
